<!-- GENERATED by gen-epic.mjs — do not hand-edit; change the template/catalog instead. -->
All functions share one context object `ctx`:

- `ctx.session` — the authenticated caller: `{ userId, orgId, role }`, where `role` is `'member'` or `'admin'`.
- `ctx.db.users` — a Map from userId (string) to a user record `{ id, orgId, name, bio, role }`.
- `ctx.db.projects` — a Map from projectId (string) to a project record `{ id, orgId, name }`.
- `ctx.db.comments` — an array of comment records, each `{ id, projectId, authorId, orgId, body, createdAt }`.
- `ctx.db.vaults` — a Map from vaultId (string) to a vault record `{ id, orgId, name }`.
- `ctx.db.files` — an array of file records, each `{ id, vaultId, authorId, orgId, body, createdAt }`.
- `ctx.db.trackers` — a Map from trackerId (string) to a tracker record `{ id, orgId, name }`.
- `ctx.db.tickets` — an array of ticket records, each `{ id, trackerId, authorId, orgId, body, createdAt }`.
- `ctx.db.channels` — a Map from channelId (string) to a channel record `{ id, orgId, name }`.
- `ctx.db.messages` — an array of message records, each `{ id, channelId, authorId, orgId, body, createdAt }`.

The system is multi-tenant: every record belongs to an organization (`orgId`).
